scripts.test:main: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_KEY=test HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_TOKEN=rpc-protected-token HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_CAPABILITY=TestServer:protected HAIBUN_O_MCPSTEPPER_ACCESS_TOKEN=mcp-client-token HAIBUN_O_MCPSTEPPER_PORT=8138 haibun-cli -c tests/config.json --with-steppers=@haibun/web-server-hono/mcp-stepper tests
scripts.test:mcp: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_KEY=test HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_PORT=8138 HAIBUN_O_MCPSTEPPER_PORT=8138 HAIBUN_O_MCPSTEPPER_ACCESS_TOKEN=mcp-client-token haibun-cli -c tests/config-mcp.json tests
scripts.test:self-test: npm run test:self-test:runner self-test.feature && npm run test:self-test:runner post
scripts.test: npm run test:main && npm run test:run-policy && npm run test:self-test
scripts.test-video: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_CAPTURE_VIDEO=true HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_A11YSTEPPER_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_KEY=test HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_TOKEN=rpc-protected-token HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_CAPABILITY=TestServer:protected haibun-cli tests
scripts.test-debug: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_A11YSTEPPER_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_TOKEN=rpc-protected-token HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_CAPABILITY=TestServer:protected haibun-cli -c tests/config-debug.json tests
scripts.test-debug-mcp: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_A11YSTEPPER_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_TOKEN=rpc-protected-token HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_CAPABILITY=TestServer:protected haibun-cli -c tests/config-debug-mcp.json tests
scripts.test-narrator: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_A11YSTEPPER_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_TOKEN=rpc-protected-token HAIBUN_O_WEBSERVERSTEPPER_RPC_ACCESS_CAPABILITY=TestServer:protected haibun-cli -c tests/config-narrator.json tests
scripts.cli: HAIBUN_ENV=fromenv=envvalue HAIBUN_O_OUTJUNIT_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_A11YSTEPPER_STORAGE=StorageFS HAIBUN_O_WEBPLAYWRIGHT_STORAGE=StorageFS haibun-cli -c cli/config-debug-mcp.json cli
scripts.test:run-policy: npm run policy:permissive && npm run policy:restricted:pass && npm run policy:wildcard:read && npm run policy:dry-run
